name: Eggplant Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 2.5 Cups Italian Style Meat Mix, thawed
0.5 Cup Grated Parmesan or Romano Cheese
recipeInstructions:
Separate recipe.
I'd use deli cheese, much cheaper.
Refrigerate the casserole overnight, then bake it about 45 minutes at 375 degrees
Pour oil 1/2 inch deep in a large skillet. Heat to 375°F (approximately). At this temperature, a 1-inch cube of bread will turn golden brown in about 50 seconds. Cut eggplant into 15 slices, about 1/4 inch thick; set aside. In a small shallow dish or pie plate, beat eggs and water to combine; set aside.
Pour bread crumbs into another small shallow dish or pie plate. Dip eggplant into the egg mixture, then into breadcrumbs. Turning once, brown coated eggplant slices in hot oil until tender when pierced with a fork. Add more oil if needed. Preheat oven to 375°F. Butter a 2-quart casserole dish. Arrange 5 eggplant slices over the bottom of the dish, overlapping if necessary. Top evenly with about one-third of the Italian style meat mix, one-third of the grated cheese, and one-third of the mozzarella cheese slices. Repeat making 2 more layers. Bake uncovered for 30 to 40 minutes until cheese melts and sauce bubbles.
6 servings
